# Lasta: Your Wellness Coach · Fitness

Generated: Jul 21, 2026, 7:09 PM

## **Contents** {#toc}

- [Bugs and stability](#theme-bugs_stability)
- [Pricing and paywall](#theme-pricing_paywall)
- [Sync and accounts](#theme-sync_accounts)


## **Bugs and stability** {#theme-bugs_stability}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      2 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: Jun 8, 2026 - Jun 13, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Mel_, Jun 13, 2026, 1/5: "Full application bug. Attempt to withdraw a second amount without my authorization of more than 60 euros. beware. but the worst is only 2 months later. he still tries to steal amounts between 50 and 60 euros from you. No expiry date, I blocked the card. to flee"
            2. _Acksone Laura Hanvichid_, Jun 8, 2026, 5/5: "I've tried several apps but this one is the right one for me. I was afraid it would be too difficult but the movements are approachable and dynamic. The sessions are short as promised but it's so good that I'm motivated to do more when I have time. I appreciate that there is no need to use accessories or a wall. I'm in the first week. The application is fluid, no bugs yet. Haven't lost weight yet but it still feels good."

## **Pricing and paywall** {#theme-pricing_paywall}

   **Pricing and paywall.**
      3 recent review(s) mention pricing and paywall.
      Review window: Jun 11, 2026 - Jul 17, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users mention price, subscriptions, or paywalls. This can signal pricing sensitivity in the niche.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Dale White_, Jul 17, 2026, 1/5: "DO NOT believe anything they advertise My experience was similar to the other one star reviews. It's too bad I did not read them before purchasing. I thought I was getting a 28-day plan. It was only after checking PayPal did I discover that I was signed up for a monthly subscription. There is nothing in the payment screen that even hint at a subscription. When questioned, they agree to cancel future payments, but refused to refund the initial payment saying it is non-refundable."
            2. _Elle Pee_, Jul 17, 2026, 1/5: "BUYER BEWARE!!! Dont sign up with Lasta app because their monthly charges are exorbitant. Even when you cancel your subscription they still charge you and wont refund your money. Instead they negotiate and refund 50% in exchange for extending to reel you in so they can charge you again in succeeding months. STAY AWAY FROM THIS COMPANY!!!"
            3. _Sarah Butterfield_, Jul 16, 2026, 1/5: "too expensive"

## **Sync and accounts** {#theme-sync_accounts}

   **Sync and accounts.**
      1 recent review(s) mention sync and accounts.
      Review window: Jul 17, 2026 - Jul 17, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users mention sync, backup, login, or accounts. This points to trust and cross-device workflow expectations.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Elizabeth DeWiggins_, Jul 17, 2026, 5/5: "When I needed assistance with my account, Emma was very quick to respond and resolve the problem."
